Enhanced version clarifies input parameters, response format with specific schema references, and confirms read-only nature for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Returns a paginated list of email logs (messages) for the account.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of email sending logs for the specified account. Supports filtering and sorting parameters to narrow results. Returns an EmailLogsListResponse containing an array of SendingMessage objects with pagination metadata. No side effects - this is a read-only operation.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about available parameters (filtering, sorting, pagination), expected response structure, and pagination behavior. Enhanced version clarifies input parameters, response format with specific schema references, and confirms read-only nature for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Get an email log message by ID
data.current_description: Returns a single message by message UUID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific email sending log message identified by its UUID (sending_message_id). No side effects - this is a read-only operation.

message: Operation 'createSendingDomain' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity on required inputs (domain name parameter) and what is returned (SendingDomain object). Added specifics about input requirements, return value structure, and the verification workflow to improve AI agent understanding of the complete operation flow.

data.current_description: Create a sending domain for email authentication. After creation, verify the domain by adding DNS records.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new sending domain for email authentication in your account. Requires the domain name as input. Returns the created SendingDomain object with initial verification status. After creation, you must verify the domain by adding the provided DNS records to your domain's DNS configuration before sending emails through this domain.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on required inputs (domain name parameter) and what is returned (SendingDomain object). Added specifics about input requirements, return value structure, and the verification workflow to improve AI agent understanding of the complete operation flow.

message: Operation 'deleteSendingDomain' has semantic quality issues: missing_side_effects. Description lacks important side effects information. Added clarity about the consequences of deletion (inability to send through the domain) and that the action is irreversible, which is critical for AI agents to understand the impact of this destructive operation.

data.current_description: Remove a sending domain from your account.
data.description_suggestion: Removes a sending domain from your account. After deletion, you will no longer be able to send emails through this domain. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Description lacks important side effects information. Added clarity about the consequences of deletion (inability to send through the domain) and that the action is irreversible, which is critical for AI agents to understand the impact of this destructive operation.

data.current_description: List and search suppressed email addresses. Returns up to 1000 suppressions per request.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of suppressed email addresses from your account's suppression list. Supports filtering and searching across suppressed addresses. Returns up to 1000 Suppression objects per request. Use pagination parameters to retrieve additional results beyond the first 1000.
data.reasoning: Description mentions the 1000-item limit but doesn't explain how to handle pagination for larger result sets. Added clarity about the return type (Suppression objects) and pagination mechanism to help AI agents understand how to retrieve complete suppression lists.
